{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Strength
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Strength]] is a liquid in a tiny stoppered glass vial that looks like quicksilver.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|He snatched it out of the air and glanced at it: a tiny stoppered glass vial, filled with what looked like quicksilver. "What's this?" "Strength," Benson said.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
